category.scope_note: Wireless and IoT radio devices including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular-enabled products exported from China to Myanmar.

title.en: China-to-Myanmar Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入缅甸：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入緬甸：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China wireless and IoT device documentation against Myanmar requirements under MSTRD (Myanmar Standards and Testing Research Division) and MPT (Myanmar Posts and Telecommunications), covering radio type-approval, electrical safety, EMC, import permits, and cybersecurity status.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国无线及物联网设备文件与缅甸MSTRD（缅甸标准与检测研究部）及MPT（缅甸邮政与电信）要求的差距对照，涵盖无线电型号核准、电气安全、电磁兼容、进口许可证及网络安全现状。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國無線及物聯網裝置文件與緬甸MSTRD（緬甸標準與檢測研究部）及MPT（緬甸郵政與電信）要求的差距對照，涵蓋無線電型號核准、電氣安全、電磁相容、進口許可證及網路安全現狀。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Myanmar's regulatory framework for wireless devices is evolving and enforcement practices may differ from published rules. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current requirements with qualified professionals and the relevant Myanmar authorities (MSTRD, MPT, MIC) before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。缅甸无线设备监管框架仍在演变，实际执法可能与已发布规定存在差异。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货前，应与合格专业人士及缅甸相关主管机构（MSTRD、MPT、MIC）核验现行要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。緬甸無線設備監管框架仍在演變，實際執法可能與已發布規定存在差異。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨前，應與合格專業人士及緬甸相關主管機構（MSTRD、MPT、MIC）核驗現行要求。

answer_first.en: MPT radio type-approval is the primary mandatory requirement for wireless devices entering Myanmar. Electrical safety follows MS/IEC standards (230 V, 50 Hz grid). EMC requirements exist but are largely voluntary. Myanmar has no formal horizontal cybersecurity framework for wireless devices. MIC import permits may be required for restricted product categories. Chinese SRRC and CCC documentation does not substitute for Myanmar approvals.
answer_first.zh: MPT无线电型号核准是进入缅甸无线设备的主要强制性要求。电气安全遵循MS/IEC标准（230V、50Hz电网）。电磁兼容要求存在但大多为自愿性。缅甸目前尚无针对无线设备的正式横向网络安全框架。受限类别产品可能需要MIC进口许可证。中国SRRC和CCC文件不可替代缅甸相关核准。
answer_first.zht: MPT無線電型號核准是進入緬甸無線設備的主要強制性要求。電氣安全遵循MS/IEC標準（230V、50Hz電網）。電磁相容要求存在但大多為自願性。緬甸目前尚無針對無線設備的正式橫向網路安全框架。受限類別產品可能需要MIC進口許可證。中國SRRC和CCC文件不可取代緬甸相關核准。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
